title: HyperCraft QOL
description: Skyrocket your performance and enjoy amazing quality-of-life perks with this lightweight modpack, HyperCraft QOL
body:
> Skyrocket your performance with **HyperCraft QOL**

## High Performance

Uses many high-end mods such as **Sodium** and **Lithium** to boost your FPS and take your gaming experience to the next level.

## Vanilla experience

The modpack is fully client sided, so you will not experience difference in gameplay. It is be supported by online servers (You can check the server's rules to make sure).

### Please use the most recent version

Older versions can work, and the more recent ones are pretty good, but I try to improve each versions and can not vouch for older versions.

### Mods list is on the latest version's download page:

- [https://modrinth.com/modpack/hypercraft-qol/version/v2.15](https://modrinth.com/modpack/hypercraft-qol/version/v2.15)

# Recent Update - v2.15 for MC 26.1.1

Release for 26.1.1. This does not have all of the mods sometimes included, as they have not yet been updated. This ran at ~310 fps compared to ~240 fps in vanilla. The stats will be different per computer
